contributors.bus_factor_note: Minimum number of contributors accounting for >50% of total contributions. A lower number indicates higher key-person risk.
contributors.limitations: Contributor counts use public GitHub issue, PR and contributor endpoints only.

limitations: Search queries are intentionally not collected.
Counts use GoatCounter's privacy-aware visitor model.
documentation_analytics.message: Documentation analytics access is not configured.

metric_definitions.adoption_found_count: Number of package registries where the project is registered.
metric_definitions.bus_factor: Minimum number of contributors whose departure would leave >50% of contributions uncovered.
metric_definitions.change_request_closure_ratio: PRs merged divided by (merged + closed-unmerged + open-beyond-threshold).
metric_definitions.community_standards_compliance_score: Fraction of expected community standard files present in the repository.
metric_definitions.documentation_not_found_count: Documentation 404 events grouped by normalized path.
metric_definitions.documentation_search_count: Documentation search events without raw query text.
metric_definitions.documentation_visitors: Aggregate documentation visitors from the configured documentation analytics provider.
metric_definitions.github_actions_success_rate: Completed successful workflow runs divided by completed runs.
metric_definitions.github_activity_weekly_commits: Weekly commit counts from GitHub repository statistics.
metric_definitions.github_commits_last_4w: Total commits in the last four weeks from GitHub statistics.
metric_definitions.github_commits_last_52w: Total commits in the last 52 weeks from GitHub statistics.
metric_definitions.github_governance_health_percentage: GitHub community profile health percentage when available.
metric_definitions.github_open_security_alerts: Aggregate count of open code scanning, Dependabot, and secret scanning alerts.
metric_definitions.github_traffic_clones: GitHub repository clone events over the last 14 days.
metric_definitions.github_traffic_clones_unique: Unique cloners of the GitHub repository over 14 days.
metric_definitions.github_traffic_views: GitHub repository page views over the last 14 days.
metric_definitions.github_traffic_views_unique: Unique visitors to the GitHub repository over 14 days.
metric_definitions.label_group_backlog: Open backlog deduplicated within each configured label section.
metric_definitions.label_median_close_days: Median days to close or merge for items carrying this label.
metric_definitions.label_throughput: Issues and pull requests opened or closed in the reporting period by label.
metric_definitions.median_bug_close_days: Median days from bug-labeled issue creation to close.
metric_definitions.median_first_response_days: Median days until the first issue or PR comment by someone other than the author.
metric_definitions.median_first_review_days: Median days until the first pull-request review by someone other than the author.
metric_definitions.median_issue_close_days: Median days from issue creation to close.
metric_definitions.median_pr_merge_days: Median days from pull request creation to merge.
metric_definitions.newcomer_funnel: First-time PR authors in the default period and how many had their PR merged.
metric_definitions.open_over_threshold_items: Open issues and pull requests older than reporting.stale_days.
metric_definitions.openssf_score: OpenSSF Scorecard aggregate security score (0-10, higher is better).
metric_definitions.readthedocs_no_result_searches: Documentation search queries that returned zero results.
metric_definitions.release_asset_downloads: GitHub release asset downloads, excluding generated source archives.
metric_definitions.release_cadence_stddev_days: Standard deviation of release intervals in days. Lower means more consistent cadence.
metric_definitions.untriaged_items: Open issues or pull requests with no labels.

definitions.github_stale_label: The GitHub stale label is preserved separately in label filters and label metrics.
definitions.open_over_threshold_items: Open issues and pull requests older than the configured 90-day threshold.

releases.note: GitHub auto-generated source archives are not counted as release-asset downloads.
releases.zero_download_explanation: No uploaded release assets were found; GitHub-generated source archives are excluded.

security.message: OpenSSF Scorecard data not available for this repository.

documentation_analytics.message: Documentation analytics access is not configured.

engagement.limitation: First-response and review metrics require collected issue comments and PR reviews. When review data is absent, review timing is reported as unavailable.
engagement.message: Derived from collected issue comments and bounded recent PR review data.

github.limitation: Uses public GitHub repository, issue, pull request, release and contributor APIs. Some historic label and reopen events may be unavailable.

github_actions.limitation: Requires Actions read permissions and an authenticated token.

github_activity.limitation: Repository statistics may be computed asynchronously by GitHub.

github_governance.limitation: Branch protection, rulesets, environments, and community profile data require repository admin access.

github_security.limitation: Aggregated alert counts only; sensitive vulnerability details are omitted.

github_traffic.limitation: Requires repository traffic permissions; implementation is credential-gated.

openalex.limitation: OpenAlex citation counts can lag publisher and Crossref updates.

openssf_scorecard.limitation: OpenSSF Scorecard evaluates the top 1M GitHub projects; repos outside this set may not have scores.

package_adoption.limitation: Checks Spack, conda-forge, PyPI, and ecosyste.ms for package registry presence.

readthedocs.limitation: Enable sources.readthedocs to collect native RTD analytics.

snapshots.limitation: Stores only cumulative metrics that cannot be reconstructed from issue, PR or release timestamps.

zenodo.limitation: Zenodo statistics are cumulative public record totals.
